name: NiceHash Crypto Mining Marketplace API
what_it_does: Cryptocurrency mining hashpower marketplace REST API — enabling mining farms to sell hashpower and buyers to purchase hashpower for mining various cryptocurrencies, with NiceHash Exchange for crypto trading, NiceHash OS (NHOS) for mining rig management, and a private REST API for algorithmic hashpower buying/selling, account management, and rig monitoring.
use_cases: Buying hashpower via NiceHash API for algorithmic mining cost optimization
Monitoring mining rig performance via NiceHash API for farm management automation
Managing NiceHash Exchange orders via API for automated crypto trading
Retrieving mining profitability data via NiceHash API for investment analysis tools
Automating NiceHash wallet operations via API for payout and fund management
not_for: Direct cryptocurrency node operation (NiceHash is a marketplace, not a blockchain node)
Traditional crypto exchange with deep order books (use Binance or Kraken for exchange trading)
Teams without mining hardware or hashpower trading interest
best_when: A mining operation needs to algorithmically manage hashpower buying/selling on NiceHash marketplace, or a developer needs to build mining farm monitoring and management automation.
avoid_when: You need general crypto trading without mining context, or you want a centralized exchange with wider altcoin support.

auth.notes: API Key + API Secret for HMAC-SHA256 request signing. Key generated in NiceHash account settings with permission scopes (Marketplace, Accounting, Rig Manager, etc.). X-Time header with server time. X-Nonce UUID header (unique per request). X-Organization-Id for organization API access. X-Request-Id for idempotency. Signature: HMAC-SHA256 of concatenated fields. No OAuth2.

pricing.free_tier_limits: API access is free; NiceHash charges commission on marketplace transactions (3% buyer, 2% seller)
pricing.paid_tiers: No subscription tiers; commission-based revenue model
pricing.notes: Slovenian company (Ljubljana). Founded 2014 by Marko Kobal and Matjaž Škorjanc. Notorious December 2017 hack: $64M in Bitcoin stolen. Company continued operating. Rebuilt with enhanced security. Mining marketplace: connects hashpower sellers (miners) with buyers. Supports 30+ algorithms (SHA-256, Ethash, Scrypt, etc.). NiceHash Exchange for BTC/ETH/USDT trading. NiceHash OS: Linux-based mining OS for rig management. Rig monitoring: temperature, hashrate, power consumption. Payouts in Bitcoin every 4 hours (above 0.001 BTC threshold). Popular for GPU miners. Major competitor: MiningRigRentals.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; reasonable rate limits apply

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: HMAC-SHA256 signing. X-Nonce UUID per request. X-Time server time sync required. GDPR. Slovenian company. Commission-based. 2017 hack history — rebuilt security. No webhooks — polling required.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: X-Request-Id header for idempotent requests. Order reads idempotent by order ID. Order creation with X-Request-Id allows idempotent retry.
known_agent_gotchas: HMAC-SHA256 signing required: concatenate key + nonce + timestamp + method + path + query + body
X-Time must be within 30 seconds of server time — use GET /api/v2/time to sync
X-Nonce: UUID v4 per request (not incrementing) — generate fresh per call
API key permissions are scoped: Marketplace, Accounting, Rig Manager — create minimal-scope keys
NiceHash 2017 hack: $64M stolen — company rebuilt security but reputational concern persists
Commission fees: 3% buyer / 2% seller on hashpower marketplace transactions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. HMAC-SHA256 request signing. API key permission scopes. GDPR compliant (EU). Notorious 2017 $64M hack — company rebuilt with enhanced security. No OAuth2. Cryptocurrency financial transactions — high value target. Slovenian company (EU data protection). Time-limited nonce prevents replay attacks.
